name: TrueFi
description: TrueFi is a legacy DeFi credit protocol associated with tokenized credit and undercollateralized lending markets. Current official documentation redirects to Brila, which describes BrilaRWA as formerly TrueFi, so TRU should be treated as a migration-sensitive protocol/governance token until canonical issuer, protocol status, and asset scope are verified.

_meta.notes: Initial scaffold for TrueFi/TRU. Verify whether Nexus should track TRU as a current asset, legacy protocol token, or migrate to Brila-related asset model.
